failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the item price.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal matched the user request: retrieve the price for item 1096508426. The required tool call was attempted with concrete arguments at index 3. The tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, stating that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a malformed invocation, access block, or reasoning error. The error was not resolved later; the agent simply reported inability to complete the task.
